title: Torchic Betico
description: Torchic joins Real Betis! This mod introduces a custom Torchic wearing a Betis football shirt in Cobblemon.
body:
Torchic Betico is an add-on for Cobblemon that introduces a custom variant of Torchic wearing a Real Betis football shirt.

Ever wondered what Torchic would look like supporting Real Betis? This mod answers that question by giving Torchic a unique look.
